meta.note: Weightages are initial estimates based on analysis of official syllabi and past papers. All values should be updated via admin panel as official patterns evolve. This structure is designed for maximum topic coverage and intelligent question generation.

optional_subjects.selection_rules: Select 2 subjects from different groups. Each subject carries 150 marks.

meta.conducting_body: AJKPSC (Azad Jammu & Kashmir Public Service Commission)

optional_subjects.selection_rules: Select 3 optional subjects totaling 600 marks from the following groups. Only one subject per group.

paper_specific_rules.two_paper_subjects: Generate Paper-I and Paper-II with distinct topic focuses. For languages, Paper-I typically covers classical/textual analysis while Paper-II covers modern/literary criticism.
paper_specific_rules.single_paper_subjects: Cover all major topics proportionally as per weightage.
paper_specific_rules.mixed_type_subjects: Generate objective questions (MCQs) for foundational knowledge and subjective questions for analytical depth.
